title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: VCK returns to its roots in the south
description: The Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi’s journey as a political party began when Thol. Thirumavalavan took over the mantle of the Dalit Panthers Iyakkam (DPI) in Madurai following the passing of its leader, A. Malaichamy, in 1989.
